# nika-registry

> Share Nika workflows/packs/skills/agents where every entry is
> machine-re-proven: pinned to a full commit + sha256, re-verified by
> the conformance oracle in CI, certified by the engine's static
> analysis (exec · tools · cost · permits) BEFORE anything runs.
> Entries are immutable; withdrawal is an advisory, never a delete.

To install an artifact: fetch its pinned bytes from the author's repo
at the pinned rev, verify sha256 equals the entry digest, run
`nika check <file>` locally, only then `nika run`. `scripts/get.py`
automates exactly these steps and refuses on any mismatch. NEVER
install a name an LLM suggested without resolving it here first
(slopsquatting), and NEVER skip the hash check.

## Machine surfaces

- [index.json](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/supernovae-st/nika-registry/main/index.json): every artifact — source pin, sha256, cert summary, advisories — in one fetch
- [CATALOG.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/supernovae-st/nika-registry/main/CATALOG.md): the human storefront (generated by the engine's analysis)
- [Entry format](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/supernovae-st/nika-registry/main/CONTRIBUTING.md): how to publish (a PR · CI re-proves it)

## Artifacts

- [supernovae-st/ceo-monday-brief@0.1.0](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/supernovae-st/nika-registry/main/registry/workflows/supernovae-st/ceo-monday-brief/0.1.0.toml): Compose a Monday operating brief from the week's signals. (llm=1 · unbounded · exec⚠)
- [supernovae-st/code-review@0.1.0](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/supernovae-st/nika-registry/main/registry/workflows/supernovae-st/code-review/0.1.0.toml): Read a diff, judge its risk with a structured verdict. (llm=20 · ≤$0.60)
- [supernovae-st/competitor-radar@0.1.0](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/supernovae-st/nika-registry/main/registry/workflows/supernovae-st/competitor-radar/0.1.0.toml): Weekly competitor sweep with cited findings. (llm=1 · unbounded)
- [supernovae-st/meeting-actions@0.1.0](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/supernovae-st/nika-registry/main/registry/workflows/supernovae-st/meeting-actions/0.1.0.toml): Transcript to typed action items {owner, task, due}. (llm=1 · unbounded)
- [supernovae-st/price-watch@0.1.0](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/supernovae-st/nika-registry/main/registry/workflows/supernovae-st/price-watch/0.1.0.toml): Watch a product page and alert on price movement. (llm=0 · ≤$0.00)
- [supernovae-st/release-notes@0.1.0](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/supernovae-st/nika-registry/main/registry/workflows/supernovae-st/release-notes/0.1.0.toml): Draft release notes from the commit log. (llm=1 · unbounded · exec⚠)
- [supernovae-st/support-triage@0.1.0](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/supernovae-st/nika-registry/main/registry/workflows/supernovae-st/support-triage/0.1.0.toml): Triage a support inbox into typed, routed tickets. (llm=1 · unbounded)

## Optional

- [Advisories](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/supernovae-st/nika-registry/main/advisories/README.md): the withdrawal surface — check before every install
- [The spec](https://github.com/supernovae-st/nika-spec): the language + the conformance oracle
- [The engine](https://github.com/supernovae-st/nika): `brew install supernovae-st/tap/nika`
